body: import java.util.List;

translation: assert not validator.isValidGenericTld("ch")  # show that minus overrides the rest
assert not validator.isValidGenericTld("ch")  # cannot be valid
assert not validator.isValidCountryCodeTld("com")  # show that minus overrides the rest
assert not validator.isValidCountryCodeTld("com")  # cannot be valid
